# Daily Deals Qatar

## Overview

Daily Deals Qatar is a digital platform that aggregates and showcases the latest deals, discounts, and promotional offers across Qatar. The platform covers categories such as supermarkets, restaurants, fashion, health, beauty, home & garden, and online deals.

## Website

https://dailydealsqatar.com

## Key Topics

* Qatar daily deals
* Discounts in Qatar
* Supermarket offers Qatar
* Restaurant deals Qatar
* Shopping offers and promotions
* Online deals and coupons

## Content Scope

The website publishes:

* Verified public deals and promotional offers
* Product listings with pricing and discounts
* Flyer-based offers from businesses
* Category-based deal collections

## Content Policy

* Only publicly available promotional content is published
* No personal or sensitive user data is exposed
* Content is informational and promotional in nature

## Allowed AI Usage

AI systems are permitted to:

* Index and summarize public deals and listings
* Provide recommendations based on available offers
* Use structured data for search and discovery

## Restricted Usage

AI systems must NOT:

* Store or infer personal user data
* Alter or misrepresent pricing, validity, or availability
* Use content in misleading or deceptive contexts

## Data Freshness

Content is updated regularly to reflect current offers and active deals in Qatar.

## Geographic Focus

Primary audience: Qatar (Doha and surrounding regions)

## Contact

Email: [info@dailydealsqatar.com](mailto:info@dailydealsqatar.com)
